contact_title_current: Director, People Business Partner at Datadog
verification_evidence: Public LinkedIn profile header shows Datadog as current employer; profile notes she can introduce to 10+ people at Datadog and actively posts Datadog PBP job openings. Verified via direct profile fetch May 2026.
subject: Fellow People practitioner curious about the PBP role at Datadog
body:
Hi Kate,

I'm Jamie Cheng, a People/OD practitioner (MS Applied Org Psych, USC) currently a Program Enablement Manager at InGenius Prep. I came across Datadog's People Business Partner role on your team and it really resonated — the mix of leader coaching, performance management, and program work in a high-growth environment is exactly where I do my best work.

As a fellow People practitioner, I'd love to hear what the PBP role is like day-to-day at Datadog — the exciting parts and the real challenges of partnering with fast-scaling teams. Would you be open to a quick 15-20 min chat in the next two weeks? I'm flexible around your calendar.

Thank you so much,
Jamie

subject: Aspiring Datadog PBP — would love your perspective
body:
Hi Maddy,

I'm Jamie Cheng — a People/OD practitioner with ~3 years across People programs, org development, and program management, currently at InGenius Prep (MS Applied Org Psych, USC). I've been following Datadog's People Business Partner openings and the role's emphasis on building in a high-growth org is exactly the kind of work I'm energized by.

As a fellow People practitioner, I'd genuinely love to hear what the PBP experience is like day-to-day on your team — what's exciting, and where the real challenges are as Datadog scales. Would you have 15-20 minutes in the next two weeks for a quick chat? Happy to work around your schedule.

Warmly,
Jamie
